name: Crypto Exchange KYC
description: FATF Travel Rule compliant KYC for crypto exchanges. Captures legal name, government ID, date of birth, and full address — the minimal set required to meet most jurisdictions' anti-money-laundering reporting thresholds.
description_zh: 符合 FATF Travel Rule 的加密交易所 KYC 配方。采集法定姓名、身份证号、出生日期与完整地址 — 大多数司法辖区反洗钱报告阈值所需的最小集合。

fields.justification: Legal name required by FATF Travel Rule for transactions ≥ USD 1000 equivalent.
fields.justification_zh: FATF Travel Rule 要求,等值 USD 1000 以上交易需提供法定姓名。

fields.justification: Government-issued ID number for sanctions screening.
fields.justification_zh: 国家颁发的身份证号,用于制裁名单筛查。

fields.justification: Date of birth for age verification (must be ≥ 18) and identity matching.
fields.justification_zh: 出生日期用于年龄验证(必须 ≥ 18)及身份匹配。

fields.justification: Full residential address for tax reporting and travel-rule recipient identification.
fields.justification_zh: 完整居住地址,用于税务报告和 travel-rule 收件方识别。

fields.justification: Confirms the user has completed government-backed real-name verification.
fields.justification_zh: 确认用户已完成政府支持的实名验证。
可选的第二因子 + 交易通知通道。

purpose: Onboarding for a regulated cryptocurrency exchange. Used to satisfy FATF Travel Rule, FinCEN BSA, and equivalent local AML/CTF requirements. Data is retained for the period required by the operating jurisdiction (typically 5-7 years post account closure) and is subject to law enforcement disclosure on valid legal request only.
purpose_zh: 持牌加密货币交易所开户。用于满足 FATF Travel Rule、FinCEN BSA 及当地等价反洗钱/反恐融资要求。数据保留期为运营辖区要求(通常账户关闭后 5-7 年),仅在有效法律要求下向执法披露。
author: TDEN team
